summary: SK-16 (complete checkout successfully, Jira Mode B) — E2E-only multi-step slice against Saucedemo (cart -> information -> overview -> complete; front-end-only app, no order API). Three tests — full checkout to the confirmation, overview shows the correct item, and missing-required-field validation — all passed live: 0 failures, 0 bug drafts. The whole flow (including the validation error and the 'Thank you for your order!' confirmation) was verified live via the playwright-test MCP before authoring.
release_recommendation_reasoning: All three risks are covered_passing. RISK-001 (checkout cannot complete) is covered by TC-001, which walked cart -> information -> overview -> Finish and reached /checkout-complete.html with the 'Thank you for your order!' confirmation. RISK-002 (overview shows wrong items) is covered by TC-002, which asserts the overview lists exactly the added product. RISK-003 (missing required field accepted) is covered by TC-003, which confirmed an empty postal code is rejected with 'Error: Postal Code is required' and the overview is not reached. No blocking failures, no flakes, no skipped or unexecuted cases. E2E-only story (front-end-only checkout, no order API), so the flat execution_summary form is used.
